name: Automations
description: Create, list, update, and delete local scheduled Locus tasks without any cloud service.

tools.name: list_automations
tools.description: List local automations stored on this Mac.

tools.name: create_automation
tools.description: Create a local scheduled Locus task definition.

tools.name: update_automation
tools.description: Update a local scheduled Locus task definition.

tools.name: delete_automation
tools.description: Delete a local scheduled Locus task definition.

tools.name: run_due_automations
tools.description: Run due local automations on this Mac.
